---
title: "Investigating the Wisconsin Breast Cancer Dataset"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Introduction

Some text

# The Data

About the data

## Data Summary

Summarize the variable of interest for this.

## The Interesting Thing we Discovered Today
